textByHash.9f81334a0fb8a497c155280219fd3b63122c1e65: Wow. I haven't spoken to the living for... for... I don't remember how long.
textByHash.d20ed0ef0c9b628596098bd1d12dc86f1b6e5de7: I don't really like to talk about it, but I died there.
textByHash.4144b79aa31fea4a24479632a7682999504be0cc: I do have a scroll which might interest you that describes the timeline of the outpost. But first I wonder if I could ask you to tie up a problem?
textByHash.97dcb706bdd62779f49d42c893863d712c646bd2: Well, I left to go to the outpost against the wishes of my wife. I promised I would return to her, but obviously I did not as I died there. She's a ghost nearby, but won't listen to my apologies.
textByHash.213684d3620b42eb78561af620201974ce6d885f: OK, well perhaps you could give her a strung sapphire amulet, because this is what I gave her the day I left. Her name is Melina by the way.
textByHash.1f2563e8cf37557ebcb098c4b2cfd38c27253c24: I said it needed to be a STRUNG sapphire amulet - best get some string!
textByHash.9ef160bee86d13688b0da268d94a3456a23b3bc7: Good work. Just give it to Melina, who's wandering somewhere nearby.
textByHash.354e16e39bd7fd2cd6fb81ad0319bc40f8d7e62d: Make a strung sapphire amulet and give it to Melina!
textByHash.9ef7a36ef079e93a82a16a349230572d3c264a8e: Excellent! I am so glad she believes me. I can finally rest in peace.
textByHash.61b14260a1c719911381d520bec729967bd6f514: Of course. Let me know if it was of any use and then I can be forever free.
textByHash.0278c0497f242466ca08dde847fbd5fe84a88605: It's a good job I stuck around then isn't it! Have another copy.
textByHash.c4c88ab9dd4b26bc111918c77fa3ee26235d1e32: Take that scroll to Jorral in the outpost.
textByHash.41231e84c62e05a99be0b077ca77e008a231ba8a: Thanks for telling me! I've been waiting for ages!
